vllm.title: New weight loader without np copy
vllm.author: zhuohan123
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix #48.
This PR makes the numpy copy in the previous weight loading optional. Specifically, we implement a new hf_model_weights_iterator, which iterates all the weights of a huggingface checkpoint. We then load each weight in the checkpoint to the model's state_dict.

vllm.title: Refactor attention kernels
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR refactors attention kernels, making the helper functions more modular and pruning unused code. This PR will make it easier to add support for a new data type such as bfloat16.

vllm.title: Support bfloat16 data type
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Should be merged after #53
This PR adds support for the bfloat16 data type, which is used for some LLMs including Dolly V2.
